positive: A minimalist, stylized forest scene featuring silhouetted animals (fox, owl, deer) exploring a whimsical, glowing forest path at twilight. The composition is symmetrical and centered, emphasizing deep, rich contrasts. Use a limited palette of deep indigo, emerald green, and subtle gold accents for the glowing elements. The art style should be reminiscent of modern Scandinavian folklore, combining clean, thick linework with watercolor washes for depth. Perfect for apparel printing: vector-like clarity, high contrast, suitable for single-color screen printing overlay on dark fabric. Intricate details in the flora, ethereal mist effect, cinematic lighting.
negative: blur, ugly, disfigured, text, signature, watermark, logo, trademark, extra limbs, missing limbs, low quality, artifact, bad anatomy, noise, grayscale, photorealism, harsh lighting, bokeh
